'''Mount Dagger''' was a mostly-eroded shield [[volcano]] on the [[planet]] [[Dagobah]]. It was the only prominent natural formation on the planet. It stood at 10 km tall and was created during the birth of Dagobah, before 30,000 BBY.<ref name="NOP" />

==Description==
The only major geological feature on Dagobah, Mount Dagger stood ten kilometers tall and towered over the jungle canopy and the fog bank that shrouded the planet. A shield volcano, most of the shield had eroded away, leaving a craggy igneous spire that jutted above the [[cloud]]s. The hardened lava-interior remained intact and ripe for geological exploration and discovery. Small plants and lichens found no where else on the planet thrived in the soil around Mount Dagger.<ref name="NOP" />

{{Nature-stub}}
